label: Dining Entry
text: From the entry, the home opens into a bright dining area with clean sight lines.

label: Formal Dining Or Office
text: This flexible front room can serve as formal dining, an office, or a quiet sitting space.

label: Kitchen Island
text: The kitchen centers on the island, with open counter space and an easy working layout.

label: Kitchen Wide
text: A wider angle shows the cabinetry, appliances, and the main cooking zone in context.

label: Living Room Transition
text: The living area connects directly from the kitchen, keeping the main spaces open and easy to follow.

label: Living Room Fireplace
text: The fireplace anchors the seating area, giving this room a clear and comfortable focal point.
